Bash("D:/MEMORY/check_deploy_status.py" << 'PYEOF'
"""Check which sites need redeployment by comparing local vs A2 file timestamps."""
import urllib.request, urllib.parse, json, ssl, os, sys
from datetime import datetime, timezone

API_TOKEN = "MK0WQEH59KHVXQ8JRKKZ26LVSMT4LI7U"
HOST = "https://nl1-cl8-ats1.a2hosting.com:2083"
USER = "loaiidil"
HOME = "/home/loaiidil"
LOCAL_ROOT = r"D:\\MEMORY\\SITE_PAGES"

CTX = ssl.create_default_context\(\)
CTX.check_hostname = False
CTX.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE

SITES = [
    "careworkers.eu", "factoryjobs.eu", "buildjobs.eu", "electricjobs.eu",
    "farmworkers.eu", "horecaworkers.eu", "meatworkers.eu", "mechanicjobs.eu",
    "warehouseworkers.eu", "aluminumrecyclehub.com", "expatsinromania.org",
    "interjob.ro", "mivromania.info", "nepalezi.com",
]

def cpanel_api\(function, params=None\):
    """Call cPanel UAPI and return the parsed JSON result."""
    url = f"{HOST}/execute/{function}"
    if params:
        url += "?" + urllib.parse.urlencode\(params\)
    req = urllib.request.Request\(url, method="GET", headers={
        "Authorization": f"cpanel {USER}:{API_TOKEN}",
    }\)
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=30, context=CTX\)
        return json.loads\(resp.read\(\).decode\("utf-8"\)\)
    except Exception as e:
        return {"error": str\(e\)}

def get_remote_stat\(site\):
    """Get file info for /home/loaiidil/{site}/en/index.html via cPanel UAPI."""
    remote_path = f"{HOME}/{site}/en/index.html"
    # Try Fileman/get_file_information
    result = cpanel_api\("Fileman/get_file_information", {"path": remote_path, "include_mime": 1, "include_hash": 0}\)
    return result

def get_local_mtime\(site\):
    """Get local file modification time."""
    local_path = os.path.join\(LOCAL_ROOT, site, "en", "index.html"\)
    if os.path.exists\(local_path\):
        mtime = os.path.getmtime\(local_path\)
        return datetime.fromtimestamp\(mtime, tz=timezone.utc\), os.path.getsize\(local_path\)
    return None, None

def main\(\):
    print\("=" * 90\)
    print\(f"{'Site':<30} {'A2 Status':<20} {'A2 Modified':<22} {'Local Modified':<22} {'Action'}"\)
    print\("=" * 90\)

    needs_deploy = []
    missing_on_a2 = []
    up_to_date = []
    errors = []

    for site in SITES:
        local_mtime, local_size = get_local_mtime\(site\)
        result = get_remote_stat\(site\)

        local_str = local_mtime.strftime\("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"\) if local_mtime else "NO LOCAL FILE"

        if "error" in result:
            err_msg = str\(result["error"]\)[:40]
            print\(f"{site:<30} {'ERROR':<20} {err_msg:<22} {local_str:<22} CHECK"\)
            errors.append\(\(site, err_msg\)\)
            continue

        # Parse cPanel response
        data = result.get\("result", result\)
        if isinstance\(data, dict\):
            status = data.get\("status", None\)
            cpdata = data.get\("data", None\)
            errs = data.get\("errors", []\)

            if status == 0 or errs:
                # File doesn't exist or error
                err_detail = errs[0] if errs else "Not found"
                print\(f"{site:<30} {'MISSING':<20} {'—':<22} {local_str:<22} DEPLOY"\)
                missing_on_a2.append\(site\)
                continue

            if cpdata:
                # cpdata might be a dict with file info
                if isinstance\(cpdata, dict\):
                    mtime_remote = cpdata.get\("mtime", cpdata.get\("ctime", None\)\)
                    size_remote = cpdata.get\("size", "?"\)
                elif isinstance\(cpdata, list\) and len\(cpdata\) > 0:
                    mtime_remote = cpdata[0].get\("mtime", cpdata[0].get\("ctime", None\)\)
                    size_remote = cpdata[0].get\("size", "?"\)
                else:
                    mtime_remote = None
                    size_remote = "?"

                if mtime_remote:
                    try:
                        remote_dt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(int\(mtime_remote\), tz=timezone.utc\)
                        remote_str = remote_dt.strftime\("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"\)
                    except:
                        remote_dt = None
                        remote_str = str\(mtime_remote\)[:20]
                else:
                    remote_dt = None
                    remote_str = "UNKNOWN"

                # Compare
                if local_mtime and remote_dt:
                    if local_mtime > remote_dt:
                        action = "DEPLOY \(local newer\)"
                        needs_deploy.append\(\(site, remote_str, local_str\)\)
                    else:
                        action = "OK"
                        up_to_date.append\(site\)
                elif local_mtime:
                    action = "DEPLOY \(can't compare\)"
                    needs_deploy.append\(\(site, remote_str, local_str\)\)
                else:
                    action = "NO LOCAL FILE"
                    errors.append\(\(site, "no local file"\)\)

                print\(f"{site:<30} {f'OK \({size_remote}B\)':<20} {remote_str:<22} {local_str:<22} {action}"\)
            else:
                # No data returned - dump raw for debugging
                print\(f"{site:<30} {'NO DATA':<20} {'—':<22} {local_str:<22} CHECK"\)
                print\(f"  Raw response: {json.dumps\(result\)[:200]}"\)
                errors.append\(\(site, "no data in response"\)\)
        else:
            print\(f"{site:<30} {'UNEXPECTED':<20} {'—':<22} {local_str:<22} CHECK"\)
            print\(f"  Raw: {json.dumps\(result\)[:200]}"\)
            errors.append\(\(site, "unexpected response format"\)\)

    print\("=" * 90\)
    print\(f"\\nSUMMARY:"\)
    print\(f"  Up to date:      {len\(up_to_date\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Need deployment: {len\(needs_deploy\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Missing on A2:   {len\(missing_on_a2\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Errors/Unknown:  {len\(errors\)}"\)

    if needs_deploy:
        print\(f"\\n  Sites needing deployment \(local newer\):"\)
        for site, remote, local in needs_deploy:
            print\(f"    - {site}  \(A2: {remote}, Local: {local}\)"\)

    if missing_on_a2:
        print\(f"\\n  Sites missing en/index.html on A2:"\)
        for site in missing_on_a2:
            print\(f"    - {site}"\)

    if errors:
        print\(f"\\n  Errors:"\)
        for site, err in errors:
            print\(f"    - {site}: {err}"\)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main\(\)
PYEOF)
